home.supplierRegions.title: Ndị na-enye site na mpaghara
home.industries.title: 20+ Ụlọ ọrụ. Ahịa maka Ekonomi Eziokwu.
home.industries.subtitle: Site na nchịkọta na mmepụta ruo na ahụike na eletrọnịkị—ndị na-enye nkwado nke a kwadoro maka ụlọ ọrụ na sourcing B2B.
home.features.title: E wuru maka oge ndị kachasị mkpa na ịzụta
home.features.subtitle: Not a generic contact database. Registry-verified supplier records, landed costs, and structured RFQ workflows — built for industrial procurement teams.
home.showcase.title: Ncheta nke Na-ebute Nsonaazụ
home.showcase.subtitle: Ihu ọma zuru ezu na ndị na-enye, ụgwọ, na ihe ize ndụ. {{suppliers}} ndekọ—na-emelite mgbe niile, nke dị elu, ọ bụghị naanị ike.
home.howItWorks.title: Site na Nchọgharị ruo na Mkpebi n'ime Ntụle
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Nzọụkwụ atọ dị mfe maka sourcing mara mma. Enweghị mgbagwoju anya. Naanị nsonaazụ.
home.step1.title: Gwa anyị ihe ị chọrọ
home.step1.desc: Enter commodity, specification, quantity, destination, and lead time. Structured intake — not a keyword marketplace search.
home.step2.title: SmartSeek sourcing operator review
home.step2.desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your request, validates registry provenance, and routes RFQs to verified suppliers only.
home.step3.title: Mee Mkpebi N'ịbụ N'ezie
home.step3.desc: Receive structured quotes with MOQ, lead time, Incoterms, and supplier provenance. You decide who to engage.
home.cta.title: Mkpebi Nnọọ Malite Ebe A
home.cta.subtitle: Structured RFQ workflows for industrial procurement teams. No fabricated scale claims during beta.
home.cta.footer: Enweghị kaadị kredit · Nchekwa efu · Kpochapụ oge niile
footer.tagline: Ozi a na-agba ọsọ na AI maka ịzụ ahịa na nghọta azụmahịa maka ndị na-azụ.
footer.designedFor: Ndị na-eweta mbụ. Ozi azụmahịa mbụ. E wuru maka ndị otu ịzụrụ.
home.feature1.title: Intelligence Ihe Ize Ụzọ
home.feature1.desc: Registry-verified supplier records with procurement-oriented metadata. Risk signals from published registry and trade data — not fabricated scores.
home.feature2.title: Ngwaahịa Nchịkọta Ọnụahịa
home.feature2.desc: Nweta ọnụahịa ziri ezi gụnyere ụgwọ, ụgbọ mmiri, nkwado, na mgbanwe ego. Ncheta azụmahịa, ọ bụghị ịma atụ. Enweghị ụgwọ na-ezighị ezi.
home.feature3.title: Chọta Ndị Na-azụ na Ndụmọdụ Ahịa
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} ndị na-azụ na ndụmọdụ ahịa—n'ịbụ nke AI kwadoro site na ebumnuche, firmographics, na akara ahịa. Ọ bụghị ịkpụ na ịkpa. Data dị mma, nke a pụrụ ịtụle maka ndị na-ahụ maka ịzụta.
home.feature4.title: Nkwado Nwere Ndụmọdụ
home.feature4.desc: Nkwado nke ndekọ, nyocha asambodo, na usoro nkwado. Data nke ụkpụrụ nkwado ka ị nwee ike ịtụle ihe dị mkpa.
home.feature5.title: Data Ndị Na-enye Ụwa
home.feature5.desc: Nweta {{suppliers}} ndị na-enye nke a kwadoro na nke a tụkwasịrị obi n'elu {{countries}} mba. Họrọ site na ụlọ ọrụ, mpaghara, asambodo. Chọta onye na-enye gị n'ime sekọnd.
home.feature6.title: Sourcing reports
home.feature6.desc: Structured supplier comparisons and RFQ-ready specification summaries for procurement teams.
home.industry1.title: Nchekwa & Minerals
home.industry1.desc: Antimony, tin, lithium, cobalt, copper, na ihe dị iche iche. Ndị na-enye mineral a kwadoro maka usoro nkwụnye ego dị mkpa.
home.industry2.title: Manufacturing & Industrial
home.industry2.desc: Nweta ihe ndị a na-emepụta, akụkụ, na akụrụngwa site na ndị na-emepụta a kwadoro n'ụwa niile.
home.industry3.title: Electronics & Technology
home.industry3.desc: Chọta ndị na-enye semiconductor, ndị na-emepụta PCB, na ndị na-ekesa ihe ndị metụtara teknụzụ.
home.industry4.title: Ngwaahịa Ndị Na-azụ & Ahịa
home.industry4.desc: Jikọta na ndị na-enye maka nkwakọ ngwaahịa, ngwaahịa zuru ezu, na ngwaahịa aha nkeonwe.
home.industry5.title: Automotive & Transportation
home.industry5.desc: Nweta akụkụ ụgbọala, akụkụ OEM, na akụrụngwa njem n'ụwa niile.
home.industry6.title: Healthcare & Medical Devices
home.industry6.desc: Chọta ndị na-enye na-emezu FDA maka akụrụngwa ọgwụ na ngwaahịa ahụike.
home.industry7.title: Construction & Materials
home.industry7.desc: Nweta ihe owuwu, akụrụngwa dị arọ, na ihe ndị a na-eji wuo.
persona.procurers.headline: Belata ihe egwu. Mee ka ego dịkwuo elu. Nọgidenụ na nkwado.
persona.procurers.subline: Registry-verified supplier discovery, landed cost tools, and operator-routed RFQs for procurement teams.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Chọta ngwa ngwa. Mepụta n'ezie. Bulite ngwa ngwa.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Chọta ndị na-enye nkwado na nkeji, ọ bụghị izu. Ọnụahịa dị mma maka ndị na-amalite na teknụzụ dị elu.
persona.suppliers.headline: Nweta onye nwere mmasị. Nweta ọtụtụ RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Jikọọ na {{suppliers}} ndị na-enye nkwado. Nnata ajụjụ ndị na-azụ, ma mepụta azụmahịa mbupụ gị.
persona.producers.headline: Jikwaa ụgwọ. Nyochaa ọrụ. Kesaa isi mmalite.
persona.producers.subline: Ịzụ ahịa ihe ndị na-achọ, benchmarking ụgwọ, na ịbawanye isi mmalite maka ndị isi na-emepụta.
methodology.title: Olee otú anyị si nyochaa ndị na-enye
methodology.subtitle: Dị n’elu na usoro anyị na-ewu ntụkwasị obi. Nke a bụ otú anyị si elekwasị anya na eziokwu data.
methodology.step1.title: Nchịkọta data
methodology.step1.desc: Anyị na-ejikọta data ndị na-enye site na ndekọ azụmahịa, asambodo, na ndị nwe ụlọ ọrụ a kwadoro. A na-emelite grafa ndị na-enye nke ụwa n'oge niile.
methodology.step2.title: Nyochaa
methodology.step2.desc: A na-enyocha azụmahịa nke ọ bụla n'ịzụ ahịa, ịhọpụta akụkọ ihe mere eme, na nyocha nkwado. Ndokwa bụ isi, nke nwere nkwado.
methodology.step3.title: Nyocha àgwà
methodology.step3.desc: Ngwa anyị na nyochaa ndị na-enye na oge nzaghachi, ọkwa asambodo, na nzaghachi ndị na-azụ. AI na-enyocha, na-enye akara nke ọma.
methodology.step4.title: Iji nlekọta na-aga n'ihu
methodology.step4.desc: Anyị na-enyocha ihere mgbe nile ma na-emelite ọnọdụ ndị na-enye dabere na ozi n'oge a. Ndị a kwadoro, na-enwe ezi akụkọ.
integrationsPage.title: Jikọọ SmartSeek na Stack gị
integrationsPage.subtitle: Jikọọ ndị na-enye, RFQs, na ụgwọ mbata na usoro ịzụ gị na ERP. OAuth nchekwa na ịkpọ API, na njikọ e wuru.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Jikọọ ngwaọrụ ịzụ gị dị ugbu a. Data na-anọ na njikọ na-akpaghị aka.
integrationsPage.howItWorks: Olee otú ihe si arụ ọrụ
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Họrọ SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, ma ọ bụ ndị ọzọ sitere na ndepụta.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: OAuth 2.0 kwụsịrị—enweghị okwuntughe ndị a kerịrị. Nkwado SSO nke ụlọ ọrụ.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Ndị na-enye, RFQs, na data ọnụahịa na-agbasa n'etiti usoro n'oge a.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: Buyer and supplier data is handled confidentially. TLS in transit, encryption at rest. SOC 2 attestation is in progress — we do not claim certifications we have not completed.

home.hero.badge: Amụma nchọta maka ndị na-arụ ọrụ n'ịzụ ahịa
home.hero.title1: Mara ọnụahịa gị nke ọma tupu ịbanye
home.hero.subtitleBase: Chọta ndị na-enye, tụọ ọnụahịa mbupụ ziri ezi (ụgbọ mmiri, ụtụ, ụgwọ, njem n'ime), ma kpebie n'ịtụkwasị obi.
home.hero.painLine: Kwụsịrị izipu ozi na-enweghị isi. Kwụsịrị ịma ọnụahịa. Kwụsịrị ịnwe ihe ijuanya na ụtụ.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Chọọ ndị na-enye site na ihe, usoro, mpaghara, ma ọ bụ asambodo
home.hero.chip3: Data a pụrụ ịtụkwasị obi sitere na ọtụtụ isi
home.integrations.label: Na-ejikọta na ngwaọrụ ndị otu ịzụta gị na-eji ugbu a
home.feat1.quote: "Anyị na-eji izu 3 na-eziga ozi na ndị na-eweta nke na-agaghị azaghachi — ma ka anyị na-enweta ndị na-ezighị ezi."
home.feat1.title: Chọta ndị na-eweta ndị a kwadoro na nkeji
home.feat1.desc: Ndị na-eweta a kwadoro site na {{suppliers}} ndị na-eweta. E ji akwụkwọ ndekọ ụlọ ọrụ, data ahịa, na isi mmalite nke atọ tụnyere.
home.feat1.b2: Hapụ site na asambodo, mba, MOQ, ndị ọrụ
home.feat2.quote: "Anyị kwadoro $42k. Invoice kwuru $61k. Ihe dị iche bụ ụgwọ ndị anyị na-amaghị na ọ dị."
home.feat2.title: Mara ọnụ ahịa gị ziri ezi tupu ị kpebie
home.feat2.desc: Ụgwọ, mbupu, inshọrans, ụgwọ ọdụ, VAT — a na-agbakọ ya tupu. Enweghị ihe na-eju gị anya mgbe akpa ahụ rutere.
home.feat2.b1: Nchọpụ HS na ọnụahịa ụgwọ ndụ
home.feat2.b2: Ihu ụgbọ mmiri FCL/LCL, ikuku, ngwa ngwa tụnyere
home.feat2.b3: Ntụnyere mmalite si mba dị iche iche
home.feat3.quote: "Ndị na-enye anyị kacha mma nọ na mpaghara nke ghọrọ nke na-adịghị mma. Anyị enweghi atụmatụ nkwado ma tufuo izu 6 nke mmepụta."
home.feat3.title: Chọpụta ihe ize ndụ nke ndị na-enye tupu ọ na-eri gị
home.feat3.desc: Soro ihe ngosi ize ndụ nke ịzụta na ndị na-enye na mpaghara tupu ha abanye na ihe ịrịba ama dị oke ọnụ.
home.feat3.b1: Ihe ngosi ihe ize ndụ nke ndị na-enye na mba n'otu anya
home.feat3.b2: Nkọwa nke ndọrọndọrọ ọchịchị na ụkpụrụ iwu n'oge dị ugbu a
home.feat3.b3: Ngwaahịa ndị ọzọ a na-atụ aro na-akpaghị aka
home.pain.stat1desc: Oge a na-ejikarị ndị otu na-ahụ maka ịzụta na-emefu na nyocha ndị na-enye aka
home.pain.stat2desc: Ntụle ọnwa nke ọnwa kwa afọ nke ụlọ ọrụ na-efunahụ site na ụgwọ mbata zoro ezo na nhọrọ ndị na-enye na-adịghị mma
home.pain.stat3desc: Ntụle mfu ọnụahịa nke ndị ọrụ SmartSeek na-akọ na ụbọchị 90 mbụ ha
home.pain.footnote: Ndị ọrụ SmartSeek na-apụta site na 14 awa nke nyocha kwa izu ruo n'okpuru 2. Nke ahụ bụ awa 12 azụ — kwa izu niile.
home.hiw.badge: Olee otú ọ si arụ ọrụ
home.hiw.title: Site na nchọgharị ruo na nkwekorita n'ime ụbọchị — ọ bụghị ọnwa
home.hiw.step1.title: Chọta
home.hiw.step1.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers by commodity, region, and specification. Matches include registry provenance — not scraped contact lists.
home.hiw.step2.title: Tulee
home.hiw.step2.desc: Lee ọnụahịa zuru ezu n'ọnọdụ nkeji. Tụnyere ndị na-eweta site na ọnụahịa niile ebufere, ọ bụghị naanị ọnụahịa otu.
home.hiw.step3.title: Kpebie
home.hiw.step3.desc: Submit structured RFQs reviewed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator. Quotes return with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms.
home.cta.title2: ịzụ ahịa nke ọma. Ị nọ?

home.pricing.tierProDesc: Nchọgharị na-enweghị oke, ngwá ọrụ ịtụle ọnụahịa, mbupụ — n'efu nke ụbọchị 14
home.pricing.tierEnterpriseDesc: Njikọ ahaziri, nkwado pụrụ iche, ohere data buru ibu
home.trust.registryVerified: Ndị na-eweta akwụkwọ edebere na ndekọ
home.integrations.title: Na-ejikọta na ngwa gị dị ugbu a
home.integrations.sectionTitle: Na-ejikọta na ngwa ị na-eji ugbu a
home.integrations.sectionDesc: Na-ejikọta ndị na-eweta, ndị ndu, na data sourcing ozugbo na ERP, CRM, na usoro ịzụ ahịa gị. Enweghị mbupụ aka.
home.demo.badge: Ndemọ Ndụ — Enweghị Ndenye Akwụkwọ Chọrọ
home.demo.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers across industrial categories. Preview results are curated; full directory access is available to founding users during beta.
home.demo.placeholder: Gbalịa: "onye nrụpụta akwa ọka Turkey" ma ọ bụ "panels anyanwụ China"
home.demo.suppliersFound: onye na-enye ihe chọpụtara — na-egosi 3 nsonaazụ efu
home.demo.enterProduct: Tinye ngwaahịa, ihe, ma ọ bụ ụlọ ọrụ ọ bụla n'elu
home.demo.clickQuick: Ma ọ bụ pịa nchọgharị ngwa ngwa iji hụ nsonaazụ ozugbo
home.demo.freeUnlocks: Beta accounts unlock the full supplier directory and verified contact details where available.
home.capabilities.title: Engines ọgụgụ isi atọ. Otu ikpo okwu.
home.capabilities.subtitle: From verified supplier discovery to structured RFQ workflows — built for procurement teams.
home.capabilities.findSuppliersDesc: Chọọ ndị na-eweta ngwaahịa ndị a kwadoro n'ụwa niile site na ngwaahịa, obodo, asambodo, na nha. Kwadebere ịkpọtụrụ na akara mma.
home.capabilities.findLeadsDesc: Ndị na-azụ ahịa na azụmahịa a kwadoro. Kewaa site na ebumnuche, ụlọ ọrụ, mpaghara, na nha ụlọ ọrụ. E wuru maka ịkpọtụrụ B2B.
home.capabilities.aiIntelDesc: Registry provenance, landed cost estimates, and structured quote comparison for procurement decisions.
home.searchPlaceholder: Chọọ ndị na-eweta ngwaahịa a kwadoro n'ụwa niile...
home.trust.operatorRouting: Nnyocha RFQ site na ndị ọrụ
home.trust.structuredQuotes: Mpempe ọnụahịa a haziri ahazi (MOQ, oge ndu, Incoterms)
home.trustBlock.badge: E mepụtara maka ịzụ ahịa dị serious
home.trustBlock.heading: Data ziri ezi. Ọnụahịa ziri ezi. Mkpebi ziri ezi.
home.trustBlock.body: SmartSeek connects you to registry-backed supplier records and the full landed cost picture — not just unit prices. Built by cross-border sourcing operators, not a marketplace listing team.
home.trustBlock.bullet1: Ndekọ ndị na-eweta nke akwadoro site na ndekọ, enweghị echiche a na-esi na ntanetị
home.trustBlock.bullet2: Ọnụahịa zuru ezu: ibu, ụtụ, ụtụ isi, njem n'ime — niile n'ime
home.trustBlock.bullet3: Njikọ ozugbo na isi mmalite ụlọ ọrụ na kọntaktị
home.trustBlock.cta: Request beta access — founding member pricing when paid plans launch
home.hero.banner: N'efu n'oge beta · Nchekwa nchịkọta na-emeghe
home.hero.titleLine2: n'ihi ndị otu na-ahụ maka ịzụ ahịa ụlọ ọrụ
home.hero.subtitle: Chọpụta ndị na-enye ngwaahịa a kwadoro maka metals ndị strategik na ihe ndị na-arụ ọrụ ụlọ ọrụ. Zipu RFQ ma nweta ọnụahịa e si na ndị na-enye ngwaahịa a kwadoro, gụnyere MOQ, oge ndu, na Incoterms.
home.hero.builtFor: E wuru maka ndị otu na-ahụ maka ịzụ ahịa ụlọ ọrụ na-arụ ọrụ na usoro ịzụ ahịa nke na-adabere na nkọwa.
home.how.title: Usoro ịzụ ahịa na-enweghị mkpọtụ ahịa
home.how.step1Desc: Kọwaa ihe ịchọrọ: ngwaahịa, nkọwa, ọnụọgụ, ebe ịga, oge ndu. Ọ na-ewe nkeji 2.
home.how.step2Title: Anyị na-eziga ya na ndị na-enye a kwadoro
home.how.step2Desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your RFQ and routes it only to suppliers verified against public company registries.
home.how.step3Title: I nwetara ọnụahịa e si na ya
home.how.step3Desc: Onụahịa na-abịa na incoterms, oge ndu, MOQ, na mmalite nke onye na-enye. Ị na-ahọrọ onye ị ga-ejikọta.
home.why.title: Enweghị profaịlụ e wepụtara. Enweghị mgbasa ozi nke ukwuu. Enweghị ihe nkiri ahịa.
home.why.body: Every supplier we publish is checked against a company registry — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — and confirmed via direct contact. RFQs are routed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator, not by an algorithm.
home.why.pill3: Nkwukọrịta ozugbo na onye na-enye, enweghị onye na-anọchite anya
home.founding.body: Anyị na-ewepụta otu ndị na-ahụ maka ịzụta nke ọma n'oge beta ka ọ bụla akaụntụ nwee nkwado na ịzụta ozugbo na ngwa ngwa.
home.preview.lockTitle: Ndepụta zuru ezu dị maka ndị na-ahụ maka ịzụta
home.preview.lockBody: Nfree n'oge beta. Anyị na-ewepụta ndị na-azụ ahịa n'ụzọ aka ka ọ bụla akaụntụ nweta nkwado na ịzụta.
home.sections.previewTitle: Ndị na-eweta ahịrịokwu kwadoro n'ozuzu ụlọ ọrụ na ahịa ụwa
home.sections.previewBody: A sample of registry-verified suppliers across metals, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Full directory unlocked for founding users during beta.
home.how.badge: Olee otú ọ si arụ ọrụ
home.why.badge: Gịnị mere o ji dị iche
home.founding.noPayment: Enweghị kaadị kredit. Enweghị usoro ịkwụ ụgwọ n'oge beta.
home.seo.description: Operator-led industrial sourcing platform with registry-verified suppliers, structured RFQs, and strong metals expertise.
